name: Home Assistant
description: Control Home Assistant devices, schedule future actions, and receive notifications via a configurable channel.

haUrl.description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance

haToken.description: Long-lived access token from your Home Assistant profile

reportingChannel.description: OpenClaw channel ID to send action confirmations to (e.g. 'telegram')

reportingEnabled.description: Send confirmation messages after device actions

workspaceHaDir.description: Path to the ha/ context folder relative to the OpenClaw workspace. Defaults to 'ha/'
